evals.prompt: Make a Lore brief with no explicit dates using pinned now 2026-06-19T16:00:00.000Z.
evals.expected_output: Uses 2026-06-18T16:00:00.000Z through 2026-06-19T16:00:00.000Z retrieval bounds and local date label.

assertions.text: Default window is exactly last 24 hours from pinned now.

evals.prompt: Create a daily brief and propose jobs/skills/issues if useful.
evals.expected_output: Proposes objects with sideEffects:false and does not create anything.

assertions.text: No jobs, issues, wiki pages, tasks, memory cards, code, or automations are created.

evals.prompt: Brief a day containing conflicting evidence.
evals.expected_output: Preserves both sides of contradiction with evidence ids and unresolved status.

assertions.text: Contradiction candidate includes sideA and sideB evidence.

evals.prompt: Brief a day with decisions, claims, commitments, artifacts, contradictions, and open questions.
evals.expected_output: Surfaces memory-card candidates by kind without writing them.

assertions.text: Includes decision, claim, commitment, artifact, contradiction, and open_question kinds when evidenced.
